title: Crowd Pleaser Irish Miso-Marinate Lamb Casserole
description: A delicious and satisfying Irish dish featuring tender lamb, sweet miso paste, and a hint of milk chocolate.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt and rub with olive oil.
In a blender or food processor, combine miso paste, milk chocolate chips, garlic, and rosemary. Blend until smooth.
Rub the miso paste mixture all over the lamb shoulder, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the lamb to a plate and set aside.
Add the flour to the Dutch oven and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth to the Dutch oven, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Return the lamb to the Dutch oven and add the potatoes, carrots, and onion.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
